prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低位次分别为5356→6263→4910→6285→5410，整体呈波动走势，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约5410名，较2024年（6285名）有所回升。近5年位次在4910–6285之间波动，振幅约1375名，反映该校在上海考生中的报考热度存在年度波动；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021年8人、2022–2024年各10人、2025年12人、2026年15人。2026年较2025年扩招3人（+25%），扩招幅度较大，对录取位次有向下（位次数字增大）压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第30名持续上升至2026年第24名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2024年声誉评价为明显负面，主要因招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌500名，但该影响已逐步消化；2026年声誉文件未收录该校，说明近期无重大负面舆情。抖音热度排名第13（高热），食堂特色内容传播广泛，整体关注度较高；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科7个：作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A，农林学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生新增计算机类、电子信息类、机械类等热门工科专业，拓宽了专业覆盖面，可能吸引更多高分考生关注；上海市2026年考生总数约66700人（较2025年49276人增长约35.4%），竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5410名、2026年扩招25%（推高位次）、软科排名持续上升至第24名（增强吸引力）、上海考生总数大幅增长35.4%（加剧竞争）、新增热门工科专业（吸引高分考生）等多重因素，扩招压力与竞争加剧效应基本对冲，但扩招幅度较大仍构成主要下移因素。预测2026年最低位次约6172名，区间5672–6672名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 生物科学类（含生物科学、生物技术专业）
- 动物医学类（含动物医学、中兽医学、兽医公共卫生专业）
- 农学（智能农业创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 食品科学与工程类（含食品科学与工程、食品质量与安全、葡萄与葡萄酒工程、食品营养与健康专业）
- 植物保护（智慧植保创新班）
- 园艺。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 动物科学
- 化学类（含化学、应用化学专业）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术专业）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程、电气工程及其自动化、人工智能专业）
- 机械类（含机械设计制造及其自动化、车辆工程、工业设计、机械电子工程专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年中国农业大学在上海市综合类预测最低位次约6172名，区间5672–6672名。位次在预测区间内的考生建议：一档专业（生物科学类、动物医学类、农学创新班）可作为冲刺选择，学科实力强但竞争激烈；二档专业（食品科学与工程类、植物保护、园艺）为稳妥选择，学科评估顶尖且招生人数较多；三档专业（动物科学、化学类、计算机类、电子信息类、机械类）为保底选择，其中计算机类、电子信息类虽为新增热门专业但招生人数少（各1人），实际竞争可能高于预期。整体建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Shanghai comprehensive minimum rankings: 5356→6263→4910→6285→5410, showing fluctuating trends with no clear single direction; 2025 baseline ranking approximately 5410, up from 2024 (6285). Rankings fluctuated between 4910–6285 over the past 5 years, with an amplitude of about 1375, reflecting annual volatility in application popularity among Shanghai candidates; enrollment plan for comprehensive in Shanghai: 8 in 2021, 10 each in 2022–2024, 12 in 2025, 15 in 2026. 2026 sees an increase of 3 (+25%) over 2025, a significant expansion exerting downward pressure on admission ranking (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Ranking rose steadily from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; 2024 reputation evaluation was clearly negative, mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings causing a 500-rank drop in admission cutoff, but this impact has gradually dissipated; 2026 reputation file does not include this university, indicating no major negative public opinion recently. Douyin popularity ranking 13th (high heat), with widespread dissemination of cafeteria specialty content, overall attention relatively high; Fifth round discipline evaluation: 7 disciplines at A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, with top national strength in agriculture and forestry disciplines, strongly attracting candidates for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 enrollment adds popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, broadening major coverage, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates; total number of candidates in Shanghai 2026 approximately 66,700 (up about 35.4% from 49,276 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining multiple factors: 2025 baseline ranking 5410, 2026 enrollment expansion of 25% (pushing ranking upward), continuous rise in Shanghai Ranking to 24th (enhancing attractiveness), substantial 35.4% increase in Shanghai candidate numbers (intensifying competition), addition of popular engineering majors (attracting high-scoring candidates), the expansion pressure and competition intensification effects roughly offset each other, but the larger expansion still constitutes the main downward factor. Predicted 2026 minimum ranking approximately 6172, range 5672–6672.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Science, Biotechnology)
- Veterinary Medicine (including Veterinary Medicine, Traditional Chinese Veterinary Medicine, Veterinary Public Health)
- Agronomy (Smart Agriculture Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Food Science and Engineering (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Viticulture and Enology, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Plant Protection (Smart Plant Protection Innovation Class)
- Horticulture.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Animal Science
- Chemistry (including Chemistry, Applied Chemistry)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Artificial Intelligence)
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Design, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, China Agricultural University's predicted minimum ranking for comprehensive in Shanghai is approximately 6172, range 5672–6672. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised: Tier 1 majors (Biological Sciences, Veterinary Medicine, Agronomy Innovation Class) can be chosen as reach options, with strong discipline strength but intense competition; Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering, Plant Protection, Horticulture) are safe choices, with top discipline evaluations and larger enrollment numbers; Tier 3 majors (Animal Science, Chemistry, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering) are safety options, among which Computer Science and Electronic Information, though newly added popular majors, have small enrollment (1 each), so actual competition may be higher than expected. Overall advice: focus on Tier 2 as main, Tier 1 as reach, Tier 3 as safety.
